testcase.name: test_reading_order

failure.message: AssertionError: Elements not in reading order assert (1, 40, 50.0) >= (1, 80, 50.0)

testcase.failure: tests/test_pdf_parser.py:135: in test_reading_order assert key >= prev_key, "Elements not in reading order" E AssertionError: Elements not in reading order E assert (1, 40, 50.0) >= (1, 80, 50.0)
